audit_items.proof_trace: All pointer dereferences in controls.c are guarded by preceding null checks or loop conditions that enforce non-NULL before access. Memory allocation results (LDAP_MALLOC/CALLOC) are checked before use; ber_scanf with '{a' format either sets a non-NULL ldctl_oid or returns LBER_ERROR which triggers an immediate early return. The one missing guard (ldap_find_control not checking oid==NULL) is in a deprecated function with no attacker-controlled call path from LDAP network input.
